form.formComment: Didn't do much at the last run, 5th (Fr1) over 1980m at this track, beaten 20 m by Kowhai Summit (2:31.50) on April 8 at $47.80. Before that 14th (FrU1) over 2100m at Phar Lap Racecourse, beaten 40 m by Switch On (2:48.80) in 4yo+ on April 1 at $72.90. Others make more appeal.

form.formComment: Last start was well beaten into tenth behind Buffy Northstains at Mt Harding over 2400m in a 4yo+ on April 12 at $4.90. Performed better the start before with a game effort when 3rd (Fr11) over 2170m at Motukarara Raceway, beaten 1.4 m by Huckleberry (2:52.00) in 3yo+ on April 6 at $4.10. Drawn favourably and deserves another chance.
